LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER PAULO MORGADO (AMENDMENT TO CASE NUMBER) OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS - PER THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT, THIS PETITION IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PETER BUSCH IN DEPARTMENT 504. PLEASE CALL HIS CLERK TO SCHEDULE THE NEW HEARING DATE AND TIME. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 504 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. THE COURT HAS THE MOVING PAPERS, REPLY AND ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PAULO MORGADO (Amendment To Case Number) Of Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus - Per the Presiding Judge's Department, this petition is transferred to be heard by Judge Peter Busch in Department 504. Please call his clerk to schedule the new hearing date and time. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its opposition to Department 504 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date no later than January 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm. The Court has the moving papers, reply and administrative record. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
